jobs.note: Few-shot is a low-leverage axis on Qwen2-Audio for this task regardless of demo source. Real-2shot baseline is identical to zero-shot.

Synth dominates train pool (5000 vs 1311 real). Both clip-level AUROC and frame-localization Pearson regress. Synth GT labels do not transfer cleanly when the baseline already has high-quality VTC+USC-SAIL pseudo-labels.
Synth-mined hardnegs (1276 adult-only + 728 background-speech scenes, n=2004 cap-limited to 623) match or slightly beat RTTM-mined hardnegs (~612 windows). Cheap drop-in replacement viable.
Mirrors C3 wavlm — synth-mined hardnegs slightly beat RTTM-mined ones. Both backbones confirm synth pool is a viable cheap drop-in for the existing real-hardneg pipeline.

Same swamping pattern as C2 pseudo-frame: 5000 synth >> 1469 real-train means the model overfits to synth distribution, which doesn't transfer to real cross-child val/test. Cross-child was the expected best case for synth (most data-hungry split), but loss is similar to C2.

Much bigger drop than C4 wavlm (-0.070 AUROC). Whisper-small is more sensitive to synth swamping than WavLM-base+ in the cross-child setting. Both backbones confirm cross-child augmentation does NOT benefit from naive 5000-synth append; the real baseline (whisper-MIL on 1469 cross-child train clips) generalized better than the augmented model.

Largest delta among completed candidates. Transformer aggregator on real USC-SAIL segments was AUROC=0.518 (worst seg-MIL config); synth-augmented combined cache lifts it to 0.637 (+0.119). Suggests transformer aggregator is bottlenecked by segment-quality noise — clean synth segments unblock it.

job_id_history: 12847606 (FAILED 0:01:44 — transformers ≥4.57 enforces 3000 mel frames; fixed via window_size 10→30 + batch_size 32→16)
12848196 (FAILED 0:00:28 — WhisperAttention(config=None) → AttributeError on _attn_implementation; fixed by passing config to WhisperAttention init in whisper-modeling/models/whisper.py:35)
12848844 (FAILED 0:00:31 — WhisperAttention.forward returns 2-tuple in newer transformers, custom code unpacks 3; fixed by robust unpack result[0],result[1] in whisper-modeling/models/whisper.py:73)
jobs.elapsed: 00:24:51 (5th attempt; trained to early-stop at epoch 17/20; best val_loss=0.235)
jobs.verdict: POSITIVE — synth-only training produces non-trivial frame classifier
jobs.note: Frame-level multi-class classifier (silence/child/adult/overlap @ 50Hz). Test accuracy 92.2% well above spec acceptance >50%. Not directly comparable to enrollment AUROC; would need to wire this checkpoint into pyannote/unified.py --diarizer usc_sail and rerun enrollment to compare against the existing pretrained whisper-base_rank8_pretrained_50k.pt. Cleared blocker that whisper-modeling pipeline can train on this cluster (4 transformers API drift patches).

positive_so_far: C1 USC-SAIL synth-only frame classifier (test acc 0.922 frame-level — feasibility confirmed; not directly comparable to clip-level table)
C3 wavlm hardneg (+0.015 AUROC over real-mined hardnegs)
C3 whisper hardneg (+0.004 AUROC — both backbones confirm synth as drop-in)
C5 seg-MIL gated_attention (+0.035 AUROC over real USC-SAIL segments)
C5 seg-MIL transformer (+0.119 AUROC — strongest clip-level delta of all candidates)
negative_so_far: C4 wavlm cross-child (-0.070 AUROC despite being the expected-best-case data-hungry split)
C4 whisper cross-child (-0.287 AUROC — biggest single negative; whisper more sensitive to synth swamping)
neutral_so_far: C6 audio-LLM (synth demos ≈ real demos ≈ zero-shot)

notes: Pattern: synth helps where the baseline pipeline is information-starved (seg-MIL transformer +0.119 AUROC, C3 hardneg) and hurts where the baseline already has high-quality signal (pseudo-frame Pearson 0.566 baseline) or where synth swamps the real distribution at training time (cross-child: 1469 real << 5000 synth → overfitting to synth, both backbones — wavlm -0.070, whisper -0.287).

C1 USC-SAIL training required 4 sequential transformers-API-drift fixes against the custom WhisperWrapper (originally written for transformers ~4.30): (1) PYTHONPATH=. for lightning_modules import; (2) window_size 10→30 because Whisper encoder enforces 3000 mel frames; (3) WhisperAttention(config=config) so self.config isn't None; (4) robust unpacking of WhisperAttention.forward return (was 3-tuple, now 2-tuple). All 4 patches committed; 5th submit (12849231) trained successfully to epoch 17/20 with val_loss=0.235 and test frame-level accuracy=0.922.

Best clip-level result: C5 seg-MIL transformer (+0.119 AUROC). Cleanest negative: C4 whisper cross-child (-0.287 AUROC). Best feasibility win: C1 USC-SAIL training pipeline now works on this cluster despite custom-WhisperWrapper drift.
